name: skills
description: Comprehensive collection of 40+ agent skills from Wondel.ai covering product strategy, UX design, marketing, sales, code craftsmanship, and systems architecture. Based on canonical product/business books. Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, and other agents via npx skills.
scan_summary: Large, well-organized multi-agent skill collection covering product, UX, marketing, sales, engineering domains. MIT licensed. Skills are pure Markdown SKILL.md files. Has .claude-plugin marketplace format, .cursor and .windsurf integration directories, plus scripts/ for npx skills CLI. No executable code in skill files. Shell scripts in /scripts are packaging utilities.

findings_summary.notes: High-quality, commercially-polished skill library from Wondel.ai. Clear skill structure with good metadata. Multi-platform compatibility (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) is a strength. All skill content is Markdown — no code execution. Live at skills.wondel.ai for browsing. No security concerns.
